text: bishenat shalovsh lemalekhut yehovyaqim melekhe-yehuda ba nevukhadenetsar melekhe-bavel yerushalaim vayatsar 'aleyha
vayiten adonay beyadov et-yehovyaqim melekhe-yehuda umiqetsat keley veyt-haelohim vayeviem erets-shine'ar beyt elohayv veet-hakelim hevi beyt ovtsar elohayv
vayomer hamelekh leashepenaz rav sarisayv lehavi mibeney yiserael umizera' hamelukha umin-haparetemim
yeladim asher eyn-bahem kal meum kh mum q vetovvey maree umasekilim bekhal-chakhema veyode'ey da'at umeviney mada' vaasher kocha bahem la'amod beheykhal hamelekh ulalamedam sefer uleshovn kasedim
vayeman lahem hamelekh devar-yovm beyovmov mipat-bag hamelekh umiyeyn mishetayv ulegadelam shanim shalovsh umiqetsatam ya'amedu lifeney hamelekh
vayehi vahem mibeney yehuda daniyel chananeya mishael va'azareya
vayasem lahem sar hasarisim shemovt vayasem ledaniyel beleteshatsar velachananeya shaderakh ulemishael meyshakh vela'azareya 'aved negov
vayasem daniyel 'al-libov asher lo-yitegaal befatebag hamelekh uveyeyn mishetayv vayevaqesh misar hasarisim asher lo yitegaal
vayiten haelohim et-daniyel lechesed ulerachamim lifeney sar hasarisim

vayomer sar hasarisim ledaniyel yare ani et-adoni hamelekh asher mina et-maakhalekhem veet-misheteykhem asher lama yiree et-peneykhem zo'afim min-hayeladim asher kegilekhem vechiyavetem et-roshi lamelekh
vayomer daniyel el-hameletsar asher mina sar hasarisim 'al-daniyel chananeya mishael va'azareya
nas-na et-'avadeykha yamim 'asara veyitenu-lanu min-hazero'im venokhela umayim venishete
veyerau lefaneykha mareeynu umaree hayeladim haokhelim et patebag hamelekh vekhaasher tiree 'ase 'im-'avadeykha
vayishema' lahem ladavar haze vayenasem yamim 'asara
umiqetsat yamim 'asara nirea mareeyhem tovv uveriey basar min-kal-hayeladim haokhelim et patebag hamelekh
vayehi hameletsar nose et-patebagam veyeyn misheteyhem venoten lahem zere'onim
vehayeladim haele areba'etam natan lahem haelohim mada' vehasekel bekhal-sefer vechakhema vedaniyel hevin bekhal-chazovn vachalomovt
ulemiqetsat hayamim asher-amar hamelekh lahaviam vayeviem sar hasarisim lifeney nevukhadenetsar
vayedaber itam hamelekh velo nimetsa mikulam kedaniyel chananeya mishael va'azareya vaya'amedu lifeney hamelekh
vekhol devar chakhemat bina asher-biqesh mehem hamelekh vayimetsaem 'eser yadovt 'al kal-hacharetumim haashafim asher bekhal-malekhutov
vayehi daniyel 'ad-shenat achat lekhovresh hamelekh f
uvishenat shetayim lemalekhut nevukhadenetsar chalam nevukhadenetsar chalomovt vatitepa'em ruchov ushenatov niheyeta 'alayv
vayomer hamelekh liqero lacharetumim velaashafim velamekhashefim velakasedim lehagid lamelekh chalomotayv vayavou vaya'amedu lifeney hamelekh
vayomer lahem hamelekh chalovm chalameti vatipa'em ruchi lada'at et-hachalovm
vayedaberu hakasedim lamelekh aramit maleka le'alemin cheyi emar chelema le'avedayikh kh le'avedakh q ufishera nechave
'ane maleka veamar lekhasedaye kh lekhasedaey q mileta mini azeda hen la tehovde'unani chelema ufishereh hadamin tite'avedun uvateykhovn nevali yitesamun
vehen chelema ufishereh tehachaon matenan unevizeba viqar sagi teqabelun min-qodamay lahen chelema ufishereh hachaoni
'anov tineyanut veamerin maleka chelema yemar le'avedovhi ufishera nehachave
'ane maleka veamar min-yatsiv yada' ana di 'idana anetun zavenin kal-qovel di chazeytovn di azeda mini mileta

di hen-chelema la tehovde'unani chadah-hi datekhovn umila khideva ushechita hazeminetun kh hizedeminetun q lememar qadamay 'ad di 'idana yishetane lahen chelema emaru li veineda' di fishereh tehachavunani

'anov khasedaye kh khasedaey q qodam-maleka veamerin la-itay anash 'al-yabesheta di milat maleka yukhal lehachavaya kal-qovel di kal-melekh rav veshalit mila khidena la sheel lekhal-charetom veashaf vekhaseday
umileta di-maleka shael yaqira veachoran la itay di yechavinah qodam maleka lahen elahin di medarehovn 'im-bisera la itovhi
kal-qovel dena maleka benas uqetsaf sagi vaamar lehovvada lekhol chakimey vavel
vedata nefeqat vechakimaya miteqatelin uve'ov daniyel vechaverovhi lehiteqetala f
bedayin daniyel hativ 'eta ute'em leareyovkh rav-tabachaya di maleka di nefaq leqatala lechakimey bavel
'ane veamar leareyovkh shalita di-maleka 'al-ma data mehachetsefa min-qodam maleka edayin mileta hovda' areyovkh ledaniyel
vedaniyel 'al uve'a min-maleka di zeman yineten-leh ufishera lehachavaya lemaleka f
edayin daniyel levayeteh azal velachananeya mishael va'azareya chaverovhi mileta hovda'
verachamin lemive'e min-qodam elah shemaya 'al-raza dena di la yehovedun daniyel vechaverovhi 'im-shear chakimey vavel
edayin ledaniyel bechezeva di-leyleya raza gali edayin daniyel barikh leelah shemaya
'ane daniyel veamar leheve shemeh di-elaha mevarakh min-'alema ve'ad-'alema di chakhemeta ugevureta di leh-hi
vehu mehashene 'idanaya vezimenaya meha'ede malekhin umehaqeym malekhin yahev chakhemeta lechakimin umanede'a leyade'ey vina
hu gale 'amiqata umesaterata yada' ma vachashovkha unehira kh unehovra q 'imeh shere
lakh ׀ elah avahati mehovde umeshabach ana di chakhemeta ugevureta yehavet li ukhe'an hovda'etani di-ve'eyna minakh di-milat maleka hovda'etena
kal-qovel dena daniyel 'al 'al-areyovkh di mani maleka lehovvada lechakimey vavel azal ׀ vekhen amar-leh lechakimey vavel al-tehovved ha'eleni qodam maleka ufishera lemaleka achave s
edayin areyovkh behitebehala hane'el ledaniyel qodam maleka vekhen amar-leh di-hashekachat gevar min-beney galuta di yehud di fishera lemaleka yehovda'
'ane maleka veamar ledaniyel di shemeh beleteshatsar haitayikh kh haitakh q kahel lehovda'utani chelema di-chazeyt ufishereh
'ane daniyel qodam maleka veamar raza di-maleka shael la chakimin ashefin charetumin gazerin yakhelin lehachavaya lemaleka
beram itay elah bishemaya gale razin vehovda' lemaleka nevukhadenetsar ma di leheve beacharit yovmaya chelemakh vechezevey reshakh 'al-mishekevakh dena hu f
aneta kh anet q maleka ra'eyovnakh 'al-mishekevakh seliqu ma di leheve acharey dena vegale razaya hovde'akh mah-di leheve
vaana la vechakhema di-itay bi min-kal-chayaya raza dena geli li lahen 'al-diverat di fishera lemaleka yehovde'un vera'eyovney livevakh tineda'
aneta kh anet q maleka chaze havayeta vaalu tselem chad sagi tsalema diken rav veziveh yatir qaem leqavelakh vereveh dechil
hu tsalema resheh di-dehav tav chadovhi udera'ovhi di khesaf me'ovhi veyarekhateh di nechash
shaqovhi di farezel ragelovhi minehovn kh mineheyn q di farezel uminehovn kh umineheyn q di chasaf
chaze havayeta 'ad di hitegezeret even di-la vidayin umechat letsalema 'al-ragelovhi di farezela vechasepa vehadeqet himovn

bedayin daqu khachada parezela chasepa nechasha kasepa vedahava vahaov ke'ur min-iderey-qayit unesa himovn rucha vekhal-atar la-hishetakhach lehovn veavena ׀ di-mechat letsalema havat letur rav umelat kal-are'a
dena chelema ufishereh nemar qodam-maleka
aneta kh anet q maleka melekh malekhaya di elah shemaya malekhuta chisena vetaqepa viqara yehav-lakh
uvekhal-di daarin kh dayerin q beney-anasha cheyvat bara ve'ovf-shemaya yehav bidakh vehasheletakh bekhalehovn aneta kh anete-hu q resha di dahava
uvaterakh tequm malekhu achori ara' minakh umalekhu telitaya kh telitaa q achori di nechasha di tishelat bekhal-are'a
umalekhu revi'aya kh revi'aa q teheve taqifa kefarezela kal-qovel di farezela mehadeq vechashel kola ukhefarezela di-mera'a' kal-ileyn tadiq vetero'a

vedi-chazayeta ragelaya veetsebe'ata minehovn kh minehen q chasaf di-fechar uminehovn kh umineheyn q parezel malekhu feliga teheve umin-nitsebeta di farezela leheve-vah kal-qovel di chazayeta parezela me'arav bachasaf tina
veetsebe'at ragelaya minehovn kh mineheyn q parezel uminehovn kh umineheyn q chasaf min-qetsat malekhuta teheve taqifa uminah teheve tevira
di kh vedi q chazayeta parezela me'arav bachasaf tina mite'arevin leheon bizera' anasha vela-leheon daveqin dena 'im-dena he-khedi farezela la mite'arav 'im-chasepa
uveyovmeyhovn di malekhaya inun yeqim elah shemaya malekhu di le'alemin la titechabal umalekhuta le'am achoran la tisheteviq tadiq vetaseyf kal-ileyn malekhevata vehi tequm le'alemaya

kal-qovel di-chazayeta di mitura itegezeret even di-la vidayin vehadeqet parezela nechasha chasepa kasepa vedahava elah rav hovda' lemaleka ma di leheve acharey dena veyatsiv chelema umeheyman pishereh f
bedayin maleka nevukhadenetsar nefal 'al-anepovhi uledaniyel segid uminecha venichochin amar lenasakha leh
'ane maleka ledaniyel veamar min-qeshot di elahakhovn hu elah elahin umare malekhin vegale razin di yekheleta lemigele raza dena
edayin maleka ledaniyel rabi umatenan raverevan sagian yehav-leh vehasheleteh 'al kal-medinat bavel verav-sigenin 'al kal-chakimey vavel
vedaniyel be'a min-maleka umani 'al 'avideta di medinat bavel leshaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov vedaniyel bitera' maleka f
nevukhadenetsar maleka 'avad tselem di-dehav rumeh amin shitin petayeh amin shit aqimeh beviqe'at dura bimedinat bavel

unevukhadenetsar maleka shelach lemikhenash ׀ laachashedarepenaya sigenaya ufachavata adaregazeraya gedaveraya detaveraya tifetaye vekhol shiletoney medinata lemete lachanukat tsalema di haqeym nevukhadenetsar maleka

bedayin mitekaneshin achashedarepenaya sigenaya ufachavata adaregazeraya gedaveraya detaveraya tifetaye vekhol shiletoney medinata lachanukat tsalema di haqeym nevukhadenetsar maleka veqaamin kh veqayemin q laqovel tsalema di haqeym nevukhadenetsar
vekharovza qare vechayil lekhovn amerin 'amemaya umaya velishanaya
be'idana di-tisheme'un qal qarena masherovqita qitarovs kh qaterovs q sabekha pesaneterin sumeponeya vekhol zeney zemara tipelun vetisegedun letselem dahava di haqeym nevukhadenetsar maleka
uman-di-la yipel veyisegud bah-sha'ata yitereme legov-atun nura yaqideta

kal-qovel dena beh-zimena kedi shame'in kal-'amemaya qal qarena masherovqita qitaros kh qaterovs q sabekha pesaneterin vekhol zeney zemara nafelin kal-'amemaya umaya velishanaya sagedin letselem dahava di haqeym nevukhadenetsar maleka
kal-qovel dena beh-zimena qerivu guverin kasedain vaakhalu qaretseyhovn di yehudaye
'anov veamerin linevukhadenetsar maleka maleka le'alemin cheyi

aneta kh anet q maleka sameta te'em di khal-enash di-yishema' qal qarena masheroqita qitaros kh qaterovs q sabekha fesaneterin vesiponeya kh vesuponeya q vekhol zeney zemara yipel veyisegud letselem dahava
uman-di-la yipel veyisegud yitereme legov-atun nura yaqideta

itay guverin yehudayin di-manita yatehovn 'al-'avidat medinat bavel shaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov guveraya ilekh la-samu 'alayikh kh 'alakh q maleka te'em lelahayikh kh lelahakh q la falechin uletselem dahava di haqeymeta la sagedin s
bedayin nevukhadenetsar biregaz vachama amar lehayetaya leshaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov bedayin guveraya ilekh heytayu qodam maleka
'ane nevukhadenetsar veamar lehovn hatseda shaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov lelahay la iteykhovn palechin uletselem dahava di haqeymet la sagedin

ke'an hen iteykhovn 'atidin di ve'idana di-tisheme'un qal qarena masherovqita qitaros kh qaterovs q sabekha pesaneterin vesumeponeya vekhol ׀ zeney zemara tipelun vetisegedun letsalema di-'avedet vehen la tisegedun bah-sha'ata titeremovn legov-atun nura yaqideta uman-hu elah dey yesheyzevinekhovn min-yeday
'anov shaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov veamerin lemaleka nevukhadenetsar la-chashechin anachena 'al-dena pitegam lahatavutakh
hen itay elahana di-anachena falechin yakhil lesheyzavutana min-atun nura yaqideta umin-yedakh maleka yesheyziv
vehen la yedi'a leheve-lakh maleka di lelahayikh la itayena kh itana q falechin uletselem dahava di haqeymeta la nisegud s
bedayin nevukhadenetsar hitemeli chema utselem anepovhi eshetanu kh eshetani q 'al-shaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov 'ane veamar lemeze leatuna chad-shive'a 'al di chaze lemezeyeh
uleguverin gibarey-chayil di vechayeleh amar lekhapata leshaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov lemireme leatun nura yaqideta
bedayin guveraya ilekh kefitu besarebaleyhovn patisheyhovn kh patesheyhovn q vekharebelatehovn ulevusheyhovn uremiv legov-atun nura yaqideta
kal-qovel dena min-di milat maleka machetsefa veatuna eze yatira guveraya ilekh di hasiqu leshaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov qatil himovn sheviva di nura
veguveraya ilekh telatehovn shaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov nefalu legov-atun-nura yaqideta mekhapetin f
edayin nevukhadenetsar maleka tevah veqam behitebehala 'ane veamar lehadaverovhi hala guverin telata remeyna legov-nura mekhapetin 'anayin veamerin lemaleka yatsiva maleka
'ane veamar ha-ana chaze guverin arebe'a sherayin mahelekhin begov-nura vachaval la-itay behovn vereveh di revi'aya kh revi'aa q dame levar-elahin s

bedayin qerev nevukhadenetsar litera' atun nura yaqideta 'ane veamar shaderakh meyshakh va'aved-negov 'avedovhi di-elaha 'ilaya kh 'ilaa q puqu veetov bedayin nafeqin shaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov min-gov nura

umitekaneshin achashedarepenaya sigenaya ufachavata vehadaverey maleka chazayin leguveraya ilekh di la-shelet nura begeshemehovn use'ar reshehovn la hitecharakh vesarebaleyhovn la shenov vereycha nur la 'adat behovn

'ane nevukhadenetsar veamar berikh elahahovn di-shaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov di-shelach maleakheh vesheyziv le'avedovhi di hiterechitsu 'alovhi umilat maleka shaniv vihavu geshemeyhovn kh geshemehovn q di la-yifelechun vela-yisegedun lekhal-elah lahen lelahahovn

umini sim te'em di khal-'am uma velishan di-yemar shela kh shalu q 'al elahahovn di-shaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov hadamin yite'aved uvayeteh nevali yishetave kal-qovel di la itay ela achoran di-yikul lehatsala kidena
bedayin maleka hatselach leshaderakh meyshakh va'aved negov bimedinat bavel f
nevukhadenetsar maleka lekhal-'amemaya umaya velishanaya di daarin kh dayerin q bekhal-are'a shelamekhovn yisege
ataya vetimehaya di 'avad 'imi elaha 'ilaya kh 'ilaa q shefar qadamay lehachavaya
atovhi kema raverevin vetimehovhi kema taqifin malekhuteh malekhut 'alam veshaletaneh 'im-dar vedar
ana nevukhadenetsar shele haveyt beveyti vera'enan beheykheli
chelem chazeyt vidachalinani veharehorin 'al-mishekevi vechezevey reshi yevahalunani
umini sim te'em lehane'ala qadamay lekhol chakimey vavel di-feshar chelema yehovde'unani
bedayin 'alalin kh 'alin q charetumaya ashefaya kasedaye kh kasedaey q vegazeraya vechelema amar ana qodameyhovn ufishereh la-mehovde'in li
ve'ad achoreyn 'al qadamay daniyel di-shemeh beleteshatsar keshum elahi vedi rucha-elahin qadishin beh vechelema qadamovhi ameret
beleteshatsar rav charetumaya di ׀ ana yide'et di rucha elahin qadishin bakh vekhal-raz la-anes lakh chezevey chelemi di-chazeyt ufishereh emar
vechezevey reshi 'al-mishekevi chaze haveyt vaalu ilan begov are'a verumeh sagi
reva ilana uteqif verumeh yimete lishemaya vachazovteh lesovf kal-are'a
'afeyeh shapir veinebeh sagi umazovn lekhola-veh techotovhi tatelel ׀ cheyvat bara uve'anefovhi yedurun kh yeduran q tsiparey shemaya umineh yitezin kal-bisera
chaze haveyt bechezevey reshi 'al-mishekevi vaalu 'ir veqadish min-shemaya nachit
qare vechayil vekhen amar godu ilana veqatsitsu 'anefovhi ataru 'afeyeh uvadaru inebeh tenud cheyveta min-tachetovhi vetsiperaya min-'anefovhi
beram 'iqar shareshovhi beare'a shevuqu uveesur di-farezel unechash beditea di vara uvetal shemaya yitsetaba' ve'im-cheyveta chalaqeh ba'asav are'a
liveveh min enovsha kh anasha q yeshanovn ulevav cheyva yiteyehiv leh veshive'a 'idanin yachelefun 'alovhi

bigezerat 'irin pitegama umemar qadishin sheeleta 'ad-diverat di yinede'un chayaya di-shalit 'ilaya kh 'ilaa q bemalekhut enovsha kh anasha q uleman-di yitsebe yiteninah ushefal anashim yeqim 'alayah kh 'alah q

dena chelema chazeyt ana maleka nevukhadenetsar veaneta kh veanet q beleteshatsar pishere ׀ emar kal-qovel di ׀ kal-chakimey malekhuti la-yakhelin pishera lehovda'utani veaneta kh veanet q kahel di rucha-elahin qadishin bakh

edayin daniyel di-shemeh beleteshatsar eshetovmam kesha'a chada vera'eyonohi yevahaluneh 'ane maleka veamar beleteshatsar chelema ufishere al-yevahalakh 'ane veleteshatsar veamar marei kh mari q chelema lesaneayikh kh lesaneakh q ufishereh le'arayikh kh le'arakh ׃ q
ilana di chazayeta di reva uteqif verumeh yimete lishemaya vachazovteh lekhal-are'a
ve'afeyeh shapir veinebeh sagi umazovn lekhola-veh techotovhi tedur cheyvat bara uve'anefovhi yishekenan tsiparey shemaya
aneta kh anete-hu q maleka di revayt uteqefet urevutakh revat umetat lishemaya veshaletanakh lesovf are'a

vedi chaza maleka 'ir veqadish nachit ׀ min-shemaya veamar godu ilana vechabeluhi beram 'iqar shareshovhi beare'a shevuqu uveesur di-farezel unechash beditea di vara uvetal shemaya yitsetaba' ve'im-cheyvat bara chalaqeh 'ad di-shive'a 'idanin yachelefun 'alovhi
dena fishera maleka ugezerat 'ilaya kh 'ilaa q hi di metat 'al marei kh mari q maleka

velakh taredin min-anasha ve'im-cheyvat bara leheve medorakh ve'iseba khetovrin ׀ lakh yeta'amun umital shemaya lakh metsabe'in veshive'a 'idanin yachelefun 'alayikh kh 'alakh q 'ad di-tineda' di-shalit 'ilaya kh 'ilaa q bemalekhut anasha uleman-di yitsebe yiteninah
vedi amaru lemishebaq 'iqar shareshovhi di ilana malekhutakh lakh qayama min-di tineda' di shalitin shemaya
lahen maleka mileki yishepar 'alayikh kh 'alakh q vachatayakh kh vachataakh q betsideqa feruq va'avayatakh bemichan 'anayin hen teheve arekha lishelevetakh
kola meta 'al-nevukhadenetsar maleka f
liqetsat yarechin terey-'asar 'al-heykhal malekhuta di vavel mehalekh hava
'ane maleka veamar hala da-hi bavel rabeta di-ana venayetah leveyt malekhu biteqaf chiseni veliqar haderi
'ovd mileta befum maleka qal min-shemaya nefal lakh amerin nevukhadenetsar maleka malekhuta 'adat minakh

umin-anasha lakh taredin ve'im-cheyvat bara medorakh 'iseba khetovrin lakh yeta'amun veshive'a 'idanin yachelefun 'alayikh kh 'alakh q 'ad di-tineda' di-shalit 'ilaya kh 'ilaa q bemalekhut anasha uleman-di yitsebe yiteninah
bah-sha'ata mileta safat 'al-nevukhadenetsar umin-anasha terid ve'iseba khetovrin yekhul umital shemaya gishemeh yitsetaba' 'ad di sa'ereh kenisherin reva vetiferovhi khetsiperin

veliqetsat yovmaya ana nevukhadenetsar 'ayenay ׀ lishemaya nitelet umanede'i 'alay yetuv ule'ilaya kh ule'ilaa q barekhet ulechay 'alema shabechet vehaderet di shaletaneh shaletan 'alam umalekhuteh 'im-dar vedar
vekhal daarey kh dayerey q are'a kela chashivin ukhemitsebeyeh 'aved becheyl shemaya vedaarey kh vedayerey q are'a vela itay di-yemache videh veyemar leh ma 'avadet
beh-zimena manede'i ׀ yetuv 'alay veliqar malekhuti haderi vezivi yetuv 'alay veli hadaveray veraverevanay yeva'ovn ve'al-malekhuti hateqenat urevu yatira husefat li
ke'an ana nevukhadenetsar meshabach umerovmem umehadar lemelekh shemaya di khal-ma'avadovhi qeshot veorechateh din vedi mahelekhin begeva yakhil lehashepala f
beleshatsar maleka 'avad lechem rav leraverevanovhi alaf velaqovel alepa chamera shate
beleshatsar amar ׀ bite'em chamera lehayetaya lemaney dahava vekhasepa di hanepeq nevukhadenetsar avuhi min-heykhela di virushelem veyishetovn behovn maleka veraverevanovhi shegelateh ulechenateh
bedayin hayetiv maney dahava di hanepiqu min-heykhela di-veyt elaha di virushelem veishetiv behovn maleka veraverevanovhi shegelateh ulechenateh
ishetiv chamera veshabachu lelahey dahava vekhasepa nechasha farezela a'a veavena
bah-sha'ata nefaqu kh nefaqa q etsebe'an di yad-enash vekhatevan laqovel neverasheta 'al-gira di-khetal heykhela di maleka umaleka chaze pas yeda di khateva
edayin maleka ziohi shenovhi vera'yonohi yevahaluneh veqiterey charetseh mishetarayin vearekhubateh da leda naqeshan

qare maleka bechayil lehe'ala leashefaya kasedaye kh kasedaey q vegazeraya 'ane maleka veamar ׀ lechakimey vavel di khal-enash di-yiqere ketava dena ufishereh yechavinani aregevana yilebash vehamovnekha kh vehamenikha q di-dahava 'al-tsavereh vetaleti vemalekhuta yishelat s
edayin 'alalin kh 'alin q kol chakimey maleka vela-khahalin ketava lemiqere ufishera kh ufishereh q lehovda'a lemaleka
edayin maleka veleshatsar sagi mitebahal veziohi shanayin 'alovhi veraverevanovhi mishetabeshin
maleketa laqovel miley maleka veraverevanovhi leveyt misheteya 'alalat kh 'alat q 'anat maleketa vaameret maleka le'alemin cheyi al-yevahalukh ra'eyovnakh vezivaykh al-yishetanov

itay gevar bemalekhutakh di rucha elahin qadishin beh uveyovmey avukh nahiru vesakheletanu vechakhema kechakhemat-elahin hishetekhachat beh umaleka nevukhadenetsar avukh rav charetumin ashefin kasedain gazerin haqimeh avukh maleka

kal-qovel di rucha ׀ yatira umaneda' vesakheletanu mefashar chelemin vaachavayat achidan umeshare qiterin hishetekhachat beh bedaniyel di-maleka sam-shemeh beleteshatsar ke'an daniyel yiteqerey ufishera yehachave f
bedayin daniyel hu'al qodam maleka 'ane maleka veamar ledaniyel aneta kh anete-hu q daniyel di-min-beney galuta di yehud di hayeti maleka avi min-yehud
veshime'et 'alayikh kh 'alakh q di rucha elahin bakh venahiru vesakheletanu vechakhema yatira hishetekhachat bakh
ukhe'an hu'alu qadamay chakimaya ashefaya di-khetava dena yiqerovn ufishereh lehovda'utani vela-khahalin peshar-mileta lehachavaya

vaana shime'et 'alayikh kh 'alakh q di tukhal kh tikul q pisherin lemifeshar veqiterin lemishere ke'an hen tukhal kh tikhul q ketava lemiqere ufishereh lehovda'utani aregevana tilebash vehamovnekha kh vehamenikha q di-dahava 'al-tsaverakh vetaleta vemalekhuta tishelat f
bedayin 'ane daniyel veamar qodam maleka matenatakh lakh leheveyan unevazebeyatakh leachoran hav beram ketava eqere lemaleka ufishera ahovde'ineh
aneta kh anet q maleka elaha 'ilaya kh 'ilaa q malekhuta urevuta viqara vehadera yehav linevukhadenetsar avukh

umin-revuta di yehav-leh kol 'amemaya umaya velishanaya haov zaa'in kh zaye'in q vedachalin min-qodamovhi di-hava tsave hava qatel vedi-hava tsave hava mache vedi-hava tsave hava marim vedi-hava tsave hava mashepil
ukhedi rim liveveh verucheh tiqefat lahazada hanechat min-karese malekhuteh viqara he'ediu mineh

umin-beney anasha terid veliveveh ׀ 'im-cheyveta shevi kh shaviyev q ve'im-'aradaya medovreh 'iseba khetovrin yeta'amuneh umital shemaya gishemeh yitsetaba' 'ad di-yeda' di-shalit elaha 'ilaya kh 'ilaa q bemalekhut anasha uleman-di yitsebe yehaqeym 'alayeh kh 'alah q
veaneta kh veanet q bereh beleshatsar la hashepelet livevakh kal-qovel di khal-dena yeda'eta

ve'al mare-shemaya ׀ hiterovmameta ulemanaya di-vayeteh hayetiv qadamayikh kh qadamakh q veaneta kh veanet q veraverevanayikh kh veraverevanakh q shegelatakh ulechenatakh chamera shatayin behovn velelahey khasepa-vedahava nechasha farezela a'a veavena di la-chazayin vela-shame'in vela yade'in shabacheta velelaha di-nishemetakh bideh vekhal-orechatakh leh la hadareta
bedayin min-qodamovhi sheliyacha pasa di-yeda ukhetava dena reshim
udena khetava di reshim mene mene teqel ufaresin
dena peshar-mileta mene menah-elaha malekhutakh vehashelemah
teqel teqileta vemozaneya vehishetekhachat chasir
peres perisat malekhutakh vihivat lemaday ufaras
bedayin ׀ amar beleshatsar vehalebishu ledaniyel aregevana vehamovnekha kh vehamenikha q di-dahava 'al-tsavereh vehakherizu 'alovhi di-leheve shalit taleta bemalekhuta
beh beleyleya qetil beleshatsar maleka khasedaya kh khasedaa q f
vedareyavesh madaya kh madaa q qabel malekhuta kevar shenin shitin vetareteyn
shefar qodam dareyavesh vahaqim 'al-malekhuta laachashedarepenaya mea ve'eserin di leheon bekhal-malekhuta
ve'ela minehovn sarekhin telata di daniyel chad-minehovn di-leheon achashedarepenaya ileyn yahavin lehovn ta'ema umaleka la-leheve naziq
edayin daniyel dena hava mitenatsach 'al-sarekhaya vaachashedarepenaya kal-qovel di rucha yatira beh umaleka 'ashit lahaqamuteh 'al-kal-malekhuta

edayin sarekhaya vaachashedarepenaya haov va'ayin 'ila lehashekacha ledaniyel mitsad malekhuta vekhal-'ila ushechita la-yakhelin lehashekacha kal-qovel di-meheyman hu vekhal-shalu ushechita la hishetekhachat 'alovhi
edayin guveraya ilekh amerin di la nehashekach ledaniyel dena kal-'ila lahen hashekachena 'alovhi bedat elaheh s
edayin sarekhaya vaachashedarepenaya ilen haregishu 'al-maleka vekhen amerin leh dareyavesh maleka le'alemin cheyi

iteya'atu kol ׀ sarekhey malekhuta sigenaya vaachashedarepenaya hadaveraya ufachavata leqayama qeyam maleka uletaqafa esar di khal-di-yive'e va'u min-kal-elah veenash 'ad-yovmin telatin lahen minakh maleka yitereme legov areyavata
ke'an maleka teqim esara vetireshum ketava di la lehashenaya kedat-maday ufaras di-la te'ede
kal-qovel dena maleka dareyavesh resham ketava veesara

vedaniyel kedi yeda' di-reshim ketava 'al levayeteh vekhavin petichan leh be'iliteh neged yerushelem vezimenin telata veyovma hu ׀ barekh 'al-birekhovhi umetsale umovde qodam elaheh kal-qovel di-hava 'aved min-qademat dena s
edayin guveraya ilekh haregishu vehashekachu ledaniyel ba'e umitechanan qodam elaheh

bedayin qerivu veamerin qodam-maleka 'al-esar maleka hala esar reshameta di khal-enash di-yive'e min-kal-elah veenash 'ad-yovmin telatin lahen minakh maleka yitereme legovv areyavta 'ane maleka veamar yatsiva mileta kedat-maday ufaras di-la te'ede
bedayin 'anov veamerin qodam maleka di daniyel di min-beney galuta di yehud la-sam 'alayikh kh 'alakh q maleka te'em ve'al-esara di reshameta vezimenin telata beyovma ba'e ba'uteh
edayin maleka kedi mileta shema' sagi beesh 'alovhi ve'al daniyel sam bal lesheyzavuteh ve'ad me'aley shimesha hava mishetadar lehatsaluteh
bedayin guveraya ilekh haregishu 'al-maleka veamerin lemaleka da' maleka di-dat lemaday ufaras di-khal-esar uqeyam di-maleka yehaqeym la lehashenaya
bedayin maleka amar vehayetiv ledaniyel uremov leguba di areyavata 'ane maleka veamar ledaniyel elahakh di aneta kh anet q palach-leh bitedira hu yesheyzevinakh
veheytayit even chada vesumat 'al-pum guba vechatemah maleka be'izeqeteh uve'izeqat raverevanovhi di la-tishene tsevu bedaniyel
edayin azal maleka leheykheleh uvat tevat vedachavan la-hane'el qadamovhi veshineteh nadat 'alovhi
bedayin maleka bisheparepara yequm benageha uvehitebehala leguba di-areyavata azal
ukhemiqereveh leguba ledaniyel beqal 'atsiv ze'iq 'ane maleka veamar ledaniyel daniyel 'aved elaha chaya elahakh di aneta kh anet q palach-leh bitedira hayekhil lesheyzavutakh min-areyavata
edayin daniyel 'im-maleka malil maleka le'alemin cheyi
elahi shelach maleakheh usagar pum areyavata vela chabeluni kal-qovel di qadamovhi zakhu hishetekhachat li veaf qadamayikh kh qadamakh q maleka chavula la 'avedet
bedayin maleka sagi teev 'alovhi uledaniyel amar lehanesaqa min-guba vehusaq daniyel min-guba vekhal-chaval la-hishetekhach beh di heymin belaheh

vaamar maleka vehayetiv guveraya ilekh di-akhalu qaretsovhi di daniyel ulegov areyavata remov inun beneyhovn unesheyhovn vela-metov leare'it guba 'ad di-shelitu vehovn areyavata vekhal-garemeyhovn hadiqu
bedayin dareyavesh maleka ketav lekhal-'amemaya umaya velishanaya di daarin kh dayerin q bekhal-are'a shelamekhovn yisege

min-qodamay sim te'em di ׀ bekhal-shaletan malekhuti leheon zaa'in kh zaye'in q vedachalin min-qodam elaheh di-daniyel di-hu ׀ elaha chaya veqayam le'alemin umalekhuteh di-la titechabal veshaletaneh 'ad-sovfa
mesheyziv umatsil ve'aved atin vetimehin bishemaya uveare'a di sheyziv ledaniyel min-yad areyavata
vedaniyel dena hatselach bemalekhut dareyavesh uvemalekhut kovresh paresaya kh paresaa q f
bishenat chada leveleshatsar melekh bavel daniyel chelem chaza vechezevey resheh 'al-mishekeveh bedayin chelema khetav resh milin amar
'ane daniyel veamar chaze haveyt bechezevi 'im-leyleya vaaru areba' ruchey shemaya megichan leyama raba
veareba' cheyvan raverevan saleqan min-yama shaneyan da min-da
qademayeta kheareye vegapin di-neshar lah chaze haveyt 'ad di-meritu gapayh unetilat min-are'a ve'al-ragelayin keenash hoqimat ulevav enash yehiv lah
vaaru cheyva achori tineyana dameya ledov velisetar-chad hoqimat utelat 'ile'in befumah beyn shinayah kh shinah q vekhen amerin lah qumi akhuli besar sagi
batar dena chaze haveyt vaaru achori kinemar velah gapin areba' di-'ovf 'al gabayah kh gabah q vearebe'a reshin lecheyveta veshaletan yehiv lah

batar dena chaze haveyt bechezevey leyleya vaaru cheyva revi'aya kh revi'aa q dechila veeymetani vetaqifa yatira veshinayin di-farezel lah raverevan akhela umadeqa usheara beragelayah kh beragelah q rafesa vehi meshaneya min-kal-cheyvata di qadamayh veqarenayin 'asar lah

misetakal haveyt beqarenaya vaalu qeren achori ze'eyra sileqat beyneyhovn kh beyneyhen q utelat min-qarenaya qademayata ete'aqaru kh ete'aqara q min qodamayah kh qodamah q vaalu 'ayenin ke'ayeney anasha beqarena-da ufum memalil raverevan
chaze haveyt 'ad di kharesavan remiv ve'atiq yovmin yetiv levusheh ׀ kitelag chivar use'ar resheh ka'amar neqe kareseyeh shevivin di-nur galegilovhi nur daliq
nehar di-nur naged venafeq min-qodamovhi elef alefayim kh alefin q yeshameshuneh veribov rabevan kh rivevan q qadamovhi yequmun dina yetiv vesiferin petichu
chaze haveyt bedayin min-qal milaya raverevata di qarena memalela chaze haveyt 'ad di qetilat cheyveta vehuvad gishemah vihivat liqedat esha
ushear cheyvata he'ediv shaletanehovn vearekha vechayin yehivat lehovn 'ad-zeman ve'idan
chaze haveyt bechezevey leyleya vaaru 'im-'ananey shemaya kevar enash ate hava ve'ad-'atiq yovmaya meta uqedamovhi haqerevuhi
veleh yehiv shaletan viqar umalekhu vekhol 'amemaya umaya velishanaya leh yifelechun shaletaneh shaletan 'alam di-la ye'ede umalekhuteh di-la titechabal f
etekeriyat ruchi ana daniyel begov nidene vechezevey reshi yevahalunani
qirevet 'al-chad min-qaamaya veyatsiva eve'e-mineh 'al-kal-dena vaamar-li ufeshar milaya yehovde'inani
ileyn cheyvata raverevata di inin areba' arebe'a malekhin yequmun min-are'a
viqabelun malekhuta qadishey 'eleyovnin veyachesenun malekhuta 'ad-'alema ve'ad 'alam 'alemaya

edayin tsevit leyatsava 'al-cheyveta revi'ayeta di-havat shaneya min kalehovn kh kaleheyn q dechila yatira shinayah kh shinah q di-farezel vetiferayh di-nechash akhela madaqa usheara beragelayh rafesa
ve'al-qarenaya 'asar di vereshah veachori di sileqat unefalu kh unefala q min qodamayah kh qodamah q telat veqarena diken ve'ayenin lah vefum memalil raverevan vechezevah rav min-chaveratah
chaze haveyt veqarena diken 'aveda qerav 'im-qadishin veyakhela lehovn
'ad di-ata 'atiq yovmaya vedina yehiv leqadishey 'eleyovnin vezimena meta umalekhuta hechesinu qadishin
ken amar cheyveta revi'ayeta malekhu revi'aya kh revi'aa q teheve veare'a di tishene min-kal-malekhevata vetekhul kal-are'a utedushinah vetadeqinah
veqarenaya 'asar minah malekhuta 'asera malekhin yequmun veachoran yequm achareyhovn vehu yishene min-qademaye utelata malekhin yehashepil
umilin letsad 'ilaya kh 'ilaa q yemalil uleqadishey 'eleyovnin yevale veyisebar lehashenaya zimenin vedat veyiteyahavun bideh 'ad-'idan ve'idanin ufelag 'idan
vedina yitiv veshaletaneh yeha'edovn lehashemada ulehovvada 'ad-sovfa
umalekhuta veshaletana urevuta di malekhevat techovt kal-shemaya yehivat le'am qadishey 'eleyovnin malekhuteh malekhut 'alam vekhol shaletanaya leh yifelechun veyishetame'un
'ad-ka sovfa di-mileta ana daniyel sagi ׀ ra'eyovnay yevahalunani vezivay yishetanovn 'alay umileta belibi niteret f
bishenat shalovsh lemalekhut beleshatsar hamelekh chazovn nirea elay ani daniyel acharey hanirea elay batechila
vaeree bechazovn vayehi bireoti vaani beshushan habira asher be'eylam hamedina vaeree bechazovn vaani hayiti 'al-uval ulay
vaesa 'eynay vaeree vehine ׀ ayil echad 'omed lifeney hauval velov qeranayim vehaqeranayim gevohovt vehaachat gevoha min-hashenit vehagevoha 'ola baacharona
raiti et-haayil menagecha yama vetsafovna vanegeba vekhal-chayovt lo-ya'amedu lefanayv veeyn matsil miyadov ve'asa khiretsonov vehigedil
vaani ׀ hayiti mevin vehine tsefir-ha'izim ba min-hama'arav 'al-peney khal-haarets veeyn novge'a baarets vehatsafir qeren chazut beyn 'eynayv
vayavo 'ad-haayil ba'al haqeranayim asher raiti 'omed lifeney hauval vayarats elayv bachamat kochov

ureitiv magi'a ׀ etsel haayil vayitemaremar elayv vayakh et-haayil vayeshaber et-shetey qeranayv velo-haya khocha baayil la'amod lefanayv vayashelikhehu aretsa vayiremesehu velo-haya matsil laayil miyadov
utsefir ha'izim higedil 'ad-meod ukhe'atsemov nishebera haqeren hagedovla vata'alena chazut areba' tacheteyha leareba' ruchovt hashamayim
umin-haachat mehem yatsa qeren-achat mitse'ira vatigedal-yeter el-hanegev veel-hamizerach veel-hatsevi
vatigedal 'ad-tseva hashamayim vatapel aretsa min-hatsava umin-hakovkhavim vatiremesem
ve'ad sar-hatsava higedil umimenu herim kh huram q hatamid vehushelakh mekhovn miqedashov
vetsava tinaten 'al-hatamid befasha' vetashelekh emet aretsa ve'aseta vehitselicha
vaesheme'a echad-qadovsh medaber vayomer echad qadovsh lapalemovni hamedaber 'ad-matay hechazovn hatamid vehapesha' shomem tet veqodesh vetsava miremas
vayomer elay 'ad 'erev boqer alepayim ushelosh meovt venitsedaq qodesh
vayehi bireoti ani daniyel et-hechazovn vaavaqesha vina vehine 'omed lenegedi kemareeh-gaver
vaeshema' qovl-adam beyn ulay vayiqera vayomar gaveriel haven lehalaz et-hamaree
vayavo etsel 'amedi uvevoov nive'ati vaepela 'al-panay vayomer elay haven ben-adam ki le'et-qets hechazovn
uvedaberov 'imi niredameti 'al-panay aretsa vayiga'-bi vaya'amideni 'al-'amedi
vayomer hineni movdi'akha et asher-yiheye beacharit haza'am ki lemov'ed qets
haayil asher-raita ba'al haqeranayim malekhey maday ufaras
vehatsafir hasa'ir melekh yavan vehaqeren hagedovla asher beyn-'eynayv hu hamelekh harishovn
vehanisheberet vata'amodena areba' tacheteyha areba' malekhuyovt migovy ya'amodena velo vekhochov
uveacharit malekhutam kehatem haposhe'im ya'amod melekh 'az-panim umevin chidovt
ve'atsam kochov velo vekhochov venifelaovt yashechit vehitselicha ve'asa vehishechit 'atsumim ve'am-qedoshim
ve'al-sikhelov vehitselicha mirema beyadov uvilevavov yagedil uveshaleva yashechit rabim ve'al-sar-sarim ya'amod uveefes yad yishaver
umaree ha'erev vehaboqer asher neemar emet hu veata setom hechazovn ki leyamim rabim
vaani daniyel niheyeyti venecheleyti yamim vaaqum vae'ese et-melekhet hamelekh vaeshetovmem 'al-hamaree veeyn mevin f
bishenat achat ledareyavesh ben-achasheverovsh mizera' maday asher hamelakh 'al malekhut kasedim
bishenat achat lemalekhov ani daniyel binoti basefarim misepar hashanim asher haya devar-yehva el-yiremiya hanavi lemalovt lecharevovt yerushalaim shive'im shana
vaetena et-panay el-adonay haelohim levaqesh tefila vetachanunim betsovm vesaq vaefer
vaetepalela layhva elohay vaetevade vaomera ana adonay hael hagadovl vehanovra shomer haberit vehachesed leohavayv uleshomerey mitseotayv
chatanu ve'avinu vehiresha'enu kh hiresha'enu q umaradenu vesovr mimitseotekha umimishepateykha
velo shama'enu el-'avadeykha haneviim asher diberu beshimekha el-melakheynu sareynu vaavoteynu veel kal-'am haarets

lekha adonay hatsedaqa velanu boshet hapanim kayovm haze leish yehuda uleyovshevey yerushalaim ulekhal-yiserael haqerovim veharechoqim bekhal-haaratsovt asher hidachetam sham bema'alam asher ma'alu-vakh
yehva lanu boshet hapanim limelakheynu lesareynu velaavoteynu asher chatanu lakh
ladonay eloheynu harachamim vehaselichovt ki maradenu bov
velo shama'enu beqovl yehva eloheynu lalekhet betovrotayv asher natan lefaneynu beyad 'avadayv haneviim
vekhal-yiserael 'averu et-tovratekha vesovr levileti shemov'a beqolekha vatitakh 'aleynu haala vehashevu'a asher ketuva betovrat moshe 'eved-haelohim ki chatanu lov
vayaqem et devarayv kh devarov ׀ q asher-diber 'aleynu ve'al shofeteynu asher shefatunu lehavi 'aleynu ra'a gedola asher lo-ne'eseta tachat kal-hashamayim kaasher ne'eseta birushalaim
kaasher katuv betovrat moshe et kal-hara'a hazot baa 'aleynu velo-chilinu et-peney ׀ yehva eloheynu lashuv me'aonenu ulehasekil baamitekha
vayisheqod yehva 'al-hara'a vayevieha 'aleynu ki-tsadiq yehva eloheynu 'al-kal-ma'asayv asher 'asa velo shama'enu beqolov
ve'ata ׀ adonay eloheynu asher hovtseta et-'amekha meerets mitserayim beyad chazaqa vata'as-lekha shem kayovm haze chatanu rasha'enu
adonay kekhal-tsideqotekha yashav-na apekha vachamatekha me'irekha yerushalaim har-qadeshekha ki vachataeynu uva'aonovt avoteynu yerushalaim ve'amekha lecherepa lekhal-sevivoteynu
ve'ata ׀ shema' eloheynu el-tefilat 'avedekha veel-tachanunayv vehaer paneykha 'al-miqedashekha hashamem lema'an adonay

hate elohay ׀ azenekha ushama' piqecha kh peqach q 'eyneykha uree shomemoteynu veha'ir asher-niqera shimekha 'aleyha ki ׀ lo 'al-tsideqoteynu anachenu mapilim tachanuneynu lefaneykha ki 'al-rachameykha harabim
adonay ׀ shema'a adonay ׀ selacha adonay haqashiva va'ase al-teachar lema'anekha elohay ki-shimekha niqera 'al-'irekha ve'al-'amekha
ve'ovd ani medaber umitepalel umitevade chatati vechatat 'ami yiserael umapil techinati lifeney yehva elohay 'al har-qodesh elohay
ve'ovd ani medaber batefila vehaish gaveriel asher raiti vechazovn batechila mu'af bi'af noge'a elay ke'et minechat-'arev
vayaven vayedaber 'imi vayomar daniyel 'ata yatsati lehasekilekha vina
bitechilat tachanuneykha yatsa davar vaani bati lehagid ki chamudovt ata uvin badavar vehaven bamaree

shavu'im shive'im nechetakh 'al-'amekha ׀ ve'al-'ir qadeshekha lekhale hapesha' ulachetom kh ulehatem q chataovt kh chatat q ulekhaper 'aon ulehavi tsedeq 'olamim velachetom chazovn venavi velimeshocha qodesh qadashim
veteda' vetasekel min-motsa davar lehashiv velivenovt yerushalaim 'ad-mashicha nagid shavu'im shive'a veshavu'im shishim ushenayim tashuv veniveneta rechovv vecharuts uvetsovq ha'itim
veacharey hashavu'im shishim ushenayim yikaret mashicha veeyn lov veha'ir vehaqodesh yashechit 'am nagid haba veqitsov vashetef ve'ad qets milechama necheretset shomemovt
vehigebir berit larabim shavu'a echad vachatsi hashavu'a yashebit ׀ zevach uminecha ve'al kenaf shiqutsim meshomem ve'ad-kala venecheratsa titakh 'al-shomem f
bishenat shalovsh lekhovresh melekh paras davar nigela ledaniyel asher-niqera shemov beleteshatsar veemet hadavar vetsava gadovl uvin et-hadavar uvina lov bamaree
bayamim hahem ani daniyel hayiti miteabel shelosha shavu'im yamim
lechem chamudovt lo akhaleti uvasar vayayin lo-va el-pi vesovkh lo-sakheti 'ad-melot sheloshet shavu'im yamim f
uveyovm 'eserim veareba'a lachodesh harishovn vaani hayiti 'al yad hanahar hagadovl hu chidaqel
vaesa et-'eynay vaere vehine ish-echad lavush badim umatenayv chagurim bekhetem ufaz
ugeviyatov khetareshish ufanayv kemaree varaq ve'eynayv kelapidey esh uzero'otayv umaregelotayv ke'eyn nechoshet qalal veqovl devarayv keqovl hamovn
veraiti ani daniyel levadi et-hamarea vehaanashim asher hayu 'imi lo rau et-hamarea aval charada gedola nafela 'aleyhem vayiverechu behechave
vaani nisheareti levadi vaeree et-hamarea hagedola hazot velo nishear-bi koch vehovdi nehepakh 'alay lemashechit velo 'atsareti kocha
vaeshema' et-qovl devarayv ukheshame'i et-qovl devarayv vaani hayiti niredam 'al-panay ufanay aretsa
vehineh-yad nage'a bi vateni'eni 'al-birekay vekhapovt yaday
vayomer elay daniyel ish-chamudovt haven badevarim asher anokhi dover eleykha va'amod 'al-'amedekha ki 'ata shulacheti eleykha uvedaberov 'imi et-hadavar haze 'amadeti mare'id
vayomer elay al-tira daniyel ki ׀ min-hayovm harishovn asher natata et-libekha lehavin ulehite'anovt lifeney eloheykha nisheme'u devareykha vaani-vati bidevareykha
vesar ׀ malekhut paras 'omed lenegedi 'eserim veechad yovm vehine mikhael achad hasarim harishonim ba le'azereni vaani novtareti sham etsel malekhey faras
uvati lahavinekha et asher-yiqera le'amekha beacharit hayamim ki-'ovd chazovn layamim
uvedaberov 'imi kadevarim haele natati fanay aretsa veneelameti
vehine kidemut beney adam noge'a 'al-sefatay vaefetach-pi vaadabera vaomera el-ha'omed lenegedi adoni bamarea nehefekhu tsiray 'alay velo 'atsareti kocha
veheykh yukhal 'eved adoni ze ledaber 'im-adoni ze vaani me'ata lo-ya'amad-bi khocha uneshama lo nishearah-vi
vayosef vayiga'-bi kemaree adam vayechazeqeni
vayomer al-tira ish-chamudovt shalovm lakh chazaq vachazaq ukhedaberov 'imi hitechazaqeti vaomera yedaber adoni ki chizaqetani
vayomer hayada'eta lamah-bati eleykha ve'ata ashuv lehilachem 'im-sar paras vaani yovtse vehine sar-yavan ba
aval agid lekha et-harashum bikhetav emet veeyn echad mitechazeq 'imi 'al-ele ki im-mikhael sarekhem f
vaani bishenat achat ledareyavesh hamadi 'amedi lemachaziq ulema'ovz lov
ve'ata emet agid lakh hineh-'ovd shelosha melakhim 'omedim lefaras veharevi'i ya'ashir 'osher-gadovl mikol ukhechezeqatov ve'asherov ya'ir hakol et malekhut yavan
ve'amad melekh gibovr umashal mimeshal rav ve'asa kiretsovnov
ukhe'amedov tishaver malekhutov vetechats leareba' ruchovt hashamayim velo leacharitov velo khemashelov asher mashal ki tinatesh malekhutov velaacherim milevad-ele
veyechezaq melekhe-hanegev umin-sarayv veyechezaq 'alayv umashal mimeshal rav memeshaletov

uleqets shanim yitechabaru uvat melekhe-hanegev tavov el-melekh hatsafovn la'asovt meysharim velo-ta'etsor kovcha hazerov'a velo ya'amod uzero'ov vetinaten hi umevieyha vehayoledah umachaziqah ba'itim
ve'amad minetser sharasheyha kanov veyavo el-hachayil veyavo bema'ovz melekh hatsafovn ve'asa vahem vehecheziq
vegam eloheyhem 'im-nesikheyhem 'im-keley chemedatam kesef vezahav bashevi yavi mitserayim vehu shanim ya'amod mimelekh hatsafovn ׃
uva bemalekhut melekh hanegev veshav el-adematov
uvenov kh uvanayv q yitegaru veasefu hamovn chayalim rabim uva vov veshataf ve'avar veyashov veyitegaru kh veyitegare q 'ad ma'uza kh ma'uzov q
veyitemaremar melekh hanegev veyatsa venilecham 'imov 'im-melekh hatsafovn vehe'emid hamovn rav venitan hehamovn beyadov
venisa hehamovn yarum kh veram q levavov vehipil riboovt velo ya'ovz
veshav melekh hatsafovn vehe'emid hamovn rav min-harishovn uleqets ha'itim shanim yavov vov bechayil gadovl uvirekhush rav
uva'itim hahem rabim ya'amedu 'al-melekh hanegev uveney ׀ paritsey 'amekha yinaseu leha'amid chazovn venikheshalu
veyavo melekh hatsafovn veyishepokh sovlala velakhad 'ir mivetsarovt uzero'ovt hanegev lo ya'amodu ve'am mivecharayv veeyn kocha la'amod
veya'as haba elayv kiretsovnov veeyn 'ovmed lefanayv veya'amod beerets-hatsevi vekhala veyadov
veyasem ׀ panayv lavov betoqef kal-malekhutov visharim 'imov ve'asa uvat hanashim yiten-lov lehashechitah velo ta'amod velo-lov tiheye
veyashev kh veyasem ׀ q panayv leiyim velakhad rabim vehishebit qatsin cherepatov lov bileti cherepatov yashiv lov
veyashev panayv lema'uzey aretsov venikheshal venafal velo yimatse
ve'amad 'al-kanov ma'avir novges heder malekhut uveyamim achadim yishaver velo veapayim velo vemilechama
ve'amad 'al-kanov niveze velo-natenu 'alayv hovd malekhut uva veshaleva vehecheziq malekhut bachalaqelaqovt
uzero'ovt hashetef yishatefu milefanayv veyishaveru vegam negid berit
umin-hitechaberut elayv ya'ase mirema ve'ala ve'atsam bime'at-govy
beshaleva uvemishemaney medina yavov ve'asa asher lo-'asu avotayv vaavovt avotayv biza veshalal urekhush lahem yivezovr ve'al mivetsarim yechashev macheshevotayv ve'ad-'et
veya'er kochov ulevavov 'al-melekh hanegev bechayil gadovl umelekh hanegev yitegare lamilechama bechayil-gadovl ve'atsum 'ad-meod velo ya'amod ki-yacheshevu 'alayv machashavovt
veokheley fat-bagov yisheberuhu vecheylov yishetovf venafelu chalalim rabim
usheneyhem hamelakhim levavam lemera' ve'al-shulechan echad kazav yedaberu velo titselach ki-'ovd qets lamov'ed
veyashov aretsov birekhush gadovl ulevavov 'al-berit qodesh ve'asa veshav learetsov
lamov'ed yashuv uva vanegev velo-tiheye kharishona vekhaacharona
uvau vov tsiyim kitim venikhea veshav veza'am 'al-berit-qovdesh ve'asa veshav veyaven 'al-'ozevey berit qodesh
uzero'im mimenu ya'amodu vechilelu hamiqedash hama'ovz vehesiru hatamid venatenu hashiquts meshovmem
umareshi'ey verit yachanif bachalaqovt ve'am yode'ey elohayv yachaziqu ve'asu
umasekiley 'am yavinu larabim venikheshelu becherev uvelehava bishevi uveviza yamim
uvehikashelam ye'azeru 'ezer me'at venilevu 'aleyhem rabim bachalaqelaqovt
umin-hamasekilim yikashelu litserovf bahem ulevarer velaleben 'ad-'et qets ki-'ovd lamov'ed
ve'asa khiretsovnov hamelekh veyiterovmem veyitegadel 'al-kal-el ve'al el elim yedaber nifelaovt vehitselicha 'ad-kala za'am ki necheratsa ne'esata
ve'al-elohey avotayv lo yavin ve'al-chemedat nashim ve'al-kal-elovha lo yavin ki 'al-kol yitegadal
veleeloha ma'uzim 'al-kanov yekhabed veleelovha asher lo-yeda'uhu avotayv yekhabed bezahav uvekhesef uveeven yeqara uvachamudovt
ve'asa lemivetserey ma'uzim 'im-elovha nekhar asher hikir kh yakir q yarebe khavovd vehimeshilam barabim vaadama yechaleq bimechir
uve'et qets yitenagach 'imov melekh hanegev veyiseta'er 'alayv melekh hatsafovn berekhev uvefarashim uvaoniyovt rabovt uva vaaratsovt veshataf ve'avar
uva beerets hatsevi verabovt yikashelu veele yimaletu miyadov edovm umovav vereshit beney 'amovn
veyishelach yadov baaratsovt veerets mitserayim lo tiheye lifeleyta
umashal bemikhemaney hazahav vehakesef uvekhol chamudovt mitserayim veluvim vekhushim bemitse'adayv
ushemu'ovt yevahaluhu mimizerach umitsafovn veyatsa bechema gedola lehashemid ulehacharim rabim
veyita' aholey apadenov beyn yamim lehar-tsevi-qodesh uva 'ad-qitsov veeyn 'ovzer lov
uva'et hahi ya'amod mikhael hasar hagadovl ha'omed 'al-beney 'amekha vehayeta 'et tsara asher lo-niheyeta miheyovt govy 'ad ha'et hahi uva'et hahi yimalet 'amekha kal-hanimetsa katuv basefer
verabim miyesheney ademat-'afar yaqitsu ele lechayey 'ovlam veele lacharafovt ledireovn 'ovlam s
vehamasekilim yazehiru kezohar haraqi'a umatsediqey harabim kakovkhavim le'ovlam va'ed f
veata daniyel setom hadevarim vachatom hasefer 'ad-'et qets yeshotetu rabim vetirebe hada'at
veraiti ani daniyel vehine shenayim acherim 'omedim echad hena lisefat hayeor veechad hena lisefat hayeor
vayomer laish levush habadim asher mima'al lemeymey hayeor 'ad-matay qets hapelaovt

vaeshema' et-haish ׀ levush habadim asher mima'al lemeymey hayeor vayarem yeminov usemolov el-hashamayim vayishava' bechey ha'ovlam ki lemov'ed mov'adim vachetsi ukhekhalovt napets yad-'am-qodesh tikheleyna khal-ele
vaani shama'eti velo avin vaomera adoni ma acharit ele f
vayomer lekh daniyel ki-setumim vachatumim hadevarim 'ad-'et qets
yitebararu veyitelabenu veyitsarefu rabim vehireshi'u resha'im velo yavinu kal-resha'im vehamasekilim yavinu
ume'et husar hatamid velatet shiquts shomem yamim elef matayim vetishe'im
asherey hamechake veyagi'a leyamim elef shelosh meovt sheloshim vachamisha
